docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RAMIREZ, ANA AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, TERENCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, ANA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, ANA AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, TERENCE
REMARK:RETURN MAIL RECD. SC-100 MAILED CERTIFIED TO TERRENCE SMITH - VACANT

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF ANA RAMIREZ IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED COURT INTERPRETER MONICA HERNANDEZ. DEFENDANT TERRANCE SMITH IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF SHOWED UP LATE TO COURT AND THE CASE WAS ALREADY CALLED. CASE WAS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
